text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I happen to pass by the arcade one day, when...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I spot someone I don't expect absorbed in a
dancing game. Her expression is one of total
focus as she moves... but her rhythm is abysmal.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff... Huff... I can't do it...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm so taken aback that I fail to look away in time.
We make eye contact...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: ...Before you say anything, let me speak.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I pride myself on being able to do most tasks
better than the average person. However...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
There's one thing I find myself inept at—physical
activity.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I finish last in marathons, I've never caught a ball
in my life, and I even had to take the vaulting box
test multiple times in gym class.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Straight As in every other subject, but my PE
grades were dismal... Even now, I become
exhausted after a day out.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
As a trainer though, it's vital that my physical
health be at a respectable level.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
The other day, I was asked to do some dance
coaching.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
But I can't dance, and my schedule makes it
impossible for me to take any classes to prepare...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a dignified poise, she gestures to the screen
currently displaying a grand combo score of zero.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
So I've been using this machine in my spare time
to practice.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Unfortunately, it's much more difficult than I expected. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Maybe I should buy some more reference books.
Oh, but my bookshelves are already
overflowing...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps I'm just not built for dancing. There must
be another way to get better...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's a real shock to see someone as capable as her
struggling this much. There must be some advice I
can give to help...
choice_data_list: How about building up your stamina first?
Persistence is key! Just keep at it!
Sorry, I'm in a bit of a rush today, so...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
You're right. Stamina is essential in performing for
long periods of time. I overlooked that.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Time to relocate to a more appropriate space to
train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Curious about what she plans on doing, I tag
along to her next destination.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I'll start with ten laps—no, better to begin with
five!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff! Huff!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She continues jogging at a snail's pace until night
falls.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Huff... Wheeze... I-I can't...
choice_data_list: Don't give up! You're almost there!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff... Puff...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
...Thank you for the encouragement. It helped me
push myself further.
choice_data_list: Sorry, it just kind of slipped out.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I know it's not a grand gesture by any means, but
please let me treat you to some ramen.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We head over to a ramen restaurant and take a
seat.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I hadn't run in years. It felt quite nice.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I think I have a slightly better understanding of
what our racers see every day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We end up talking about all sorts of things over
dinner.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking of training here, but the weather
looks like it may take a turn for the worse.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
It won't do us any good to catch a cold... Let's
call it a day.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
...You're right. I can't hope to gain anything
without investing the effort.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
This is no time for self-pity! I need to focus on
improving and nothing else!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Cha-cha-cha, cha, cha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Interesting... If I lift my right foot when I jump, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Cha-cha-cha, cha, cha! ♪

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
So that's what I need to do. Right, right, left,
spin... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her hard work pays off, and she appears to slowly
get the hang of it. A few hours later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Cha-cha-cha, cha, chaaa! ♪

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: All right!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you... And, er, sorry for making a
scene... Ahem!

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I made quite a lot of progress, if I say so myself.
I'm glad I kept at it.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate all your encouraging words. Allow me
to buy you a drink as thanks.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We go to a local bar where she treats me to a
drink. Then, on our way out...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
While we may be trainers, I'm of the belief that
we should be able to dance to our racers' debut
songs at the very least.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps we could incorporate dance lessons into
the trainer workshops. Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I didn't realize—apologies for interrupting you.

text_block_list.name: Riko Kashimoto
text_block_list.text: I'll see you at the academy, then.
